programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Tommy Lee Jones and Samuel L. Jackson star in this riveting saga of a veteran Marine who becomes the scapegoat for a mission that went tragically wrong. Faced with murder charges in a case thats been rigged against him, Col. Terry Childers (Jackson) turns to a former brother-in-arms (Jones) to defend him and uncover the truth.

programme.title: Absentia
programme.desc: Tricias husband Daniel has been missing for seven years. Her younger sister Callie comes to live with her as the pressure mounts to finally declare him "dead in absentia." As Tricia sifts through the wreckage and tries to move on with her life, Callie finds herself drawn to an ominous tunnel near the house. As she begins to link it to other mysterious disappearances, it becomes clear that Daniels presumed death might be anything but "natural." The ancient force at work in the tunnel might have set its sights on Callie and Tricia ... and Daniel might be suffering a fate far worse than death in its grasp.

programme.title: The Flock
programme.desc: This film is about a hyper-vigilant employee of the department of public safety who, while training his young female replacement, has to track down a missing girl who he is convinced is connected to a paroled sex offender he is investigating.

programme.title: Noble Things
programme.desc: Jimmy Wayne Collins finds himself adrift in Memphis, Tennessee. Forced to return home to the piney woods of Southeast Texas, Jimmy will face his imprisoned brother, his dying father and the demons he left behind.

programme.title: Spooner
programme.desc: Facing eviction from his parents home on his 30th birthday, a socially awkward guy meets the girl of his dreams and creates his own rules for growing up.

programme.title: Uncle Nino
programme.desc: A distant, slightly dysfunctional family is brought closer together when the fathers long-estranged Uncle Nino comes from Italy to Chicago for a surprise visit.

programme.title: Score: A Hockey Musical
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Farley has led a sheltered life, raised on a diet of home schooling, organic living and trips to the art gallery. To his parents dismay, Farley loves to play hockey with the local kids. To their even greater dismay, Farley is scouted and signed by the owner of a junior league team, where he becomes an instant star. But Farley discovers that stardom comes with a price - including the expectation to fight on the ice. Throw in a changing relationship with his best friend, and Farley finds himself losing his way.

programme.title: Prince and Me 2: The Royal Wedding
programme.desc: The Prince and Me 2: The Royal Wedding continues the story of 2003s fantasy romance The Prince and Me. In the earlier film, Paige (Julia Stiles) - a midwestern college co-ed - falls in love with Edvard (Luke Mably), sans realizing that he is actually the Prince of Denmark. In this sequel, Paige (now played by neophyte Kam Heskin) and Eddie must confront a centuries-old Danish edict declaring that if a Danish prince marries a commoner, he must abdicate his throne. C

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: In December 1941, Japan expands the occupation of its neighbouring countries to Southeast Asia. The railway from Tianjin to Nanjing in East China became a key military transportation route, heavily guarded by Japanese soldiers. Railroad worker Ma Yuan (Jackie Chan) leads a team of freedom fighters. Using his deep knowledge of the train network, he and his men sabotage it, ambushing Japanese soldiers and stealing supplies to feed the starving Chinese. Although the freedom fighters have no weapons of their own, they employ whatever tools are at hand, including a hammer and shovels, loose railway track planks and diverted trains. The local Chinese call the unlikely heroes the "Railroad Tigers". The freedom fighters find themselves on the wrong side of the tracks when the Japanese send reinforcements to Shandong. In an act of defiance, Ma Yuan launches his most dangerous mission yet, blowing up a heavily guarded railroad bridge. When the Japanese learn of the crippling plan, which will derail the war effort, the stakes are raised even higher. After many missed opportunities and missed shots, the bridge is blown up by the ragtag Chinese railroad tigers.

programme.title: Foolproof
programme.desc: Kevin, Samantha and Rob live for Foolproof; their own private club where through high-tech, meticulously thought out and executed plans, they pull off the most impossible of heists - all in theory that is. Theyve never actually done it for real. But all that changes when Leo, a cutthroat British gangster, rips off their foolproof plans for a diamond heist and uses it to successfully execute the robbery. Threatening to implicate them, Leo blackmails them to pull off a robbery worth $20 million in corporate bonds.

programme.title: The Sandman
programme.desc: One fine morning, Benno finds sand in his bed. While he tries to ignore this at first, he soon must realize that he himself is loosing the sand. Day after day the sand increases and soon his time literally starts running short. Finally he is left no choice but to ask Sandra for help, who runs a small coffee shop under his apartment. Although Benno hates her with a passion, he started having dreams of her every night. What could Sandra and the dreams have to do with the sand?

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: A space cruiser crash lands on the purple planet of Heinous, an intergalactic prison that is home to the most vile and dangerous villains in the galaxy. All of the crew have perished except for its pilot; intergalactic space hero Max Cloud, the ships hapless chef Jake, and its reluctant Commander, Rexy. Their mission is simple, wait inside their vessel until help arrives and try their best to keep the prisoners outside from getting in, however this is Max Cloud and he doesnt do simple. ...But this is not real life. This is a video-game, and at the helm of the adventure is Sarah, a teenage video game fanatic who immerses herself in fantasy to avoid dealing with her less than packed social life and a strained relationship with her dad, straight laced single parent Tony. After a fallout, Tony bans Sarah from playing games and in a frenzy of teenage emotion Sarah makes a wish, that in the blink of an eye becomes a reality... With a flash of pixelated light Sarah is transported into the video game by the mysterious Space Witch, who exists in an etherial void, behind a secret door, that never appears in the same place twice! So Sarah finds herself trapped inside the game and the only person who can help her is her equally socially defunct but incredibly charming friend, Cowboy, who must control Sarah from her bedroom in Brooklyn and keep her from losing her one life, in a game that cant be paused, that they have never finished before! To make matters worse Sarah has not found herself inside the body of the wonderful Max Cloud, but Jake, thats right... the hapless chef. We follow Sarah as she negotiates the terrifying and dangerous planet of Heinous alongside the ever confident Max and fed up Rexy, jumping back and forth with the real world as the pressure mounts on Cowboy and the real stakes start to rise. They soon encounter stranded Bounty Hunter, Brock Donnelly, and realise they must get off the planet before help arrives as the planets surface burns so hot every day that anything not underground is space liquid! AND to add to the stakes Cowboy must keep his best friend away from the evil clutches of the games villain Revengor, a part man, part machine, lunatic who is hell bent on taking Max Clouds ship and with an army of prisoners and an evil sorcersss called SHEE, his chances look pretty damn good. The action bounces between the video game and the real world as Cowboy and Sarah must come together to get her home, all leading to the ultimate showdown in Revengors lair, where back in Brooklyn, video game expertise arrives in the form of a very unlikely hero. Sit down. Plug in. Its time to play THE INTERGALACTIC ADVENTURES OF MAX CLOUD.

programme.title: Almost Friends
programme.desc: Charlie, a culinary genius, has lost the motivation. He doesnt know what to with his life anymore, but he knows one thing - get close to Amber. In comparison to her boyfriend, he seems to be totally unattractive, but Charlies closest friend convinces him that where theres a will theres a way.

programme.title: The Good Girl
programme.desc: A discount store clerk strikes up an affair with a stock boy who considers himself the incarnation of Holden Caulfield.Justine is a sullen 30-year-old woman stuck in a dead-end job at the Retail Rodeo department store.In addition to her mind-numbing occupation, Justine also has to contend with her dim-witted husband, Phil, and his partner, Bubba, who work as house painters when they arent smoking pot and staring blankly at the television.Justine sees an opportunity for change, however, when she meets Holden, a fellow Retail Rodeo employee who is even more depressed than herself.The young Holden and Justine soon begin a passionate secret affair, unaware that it may not be so secret after all.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: Science fiction movie. Canadian sci-fi, produced in 2017. A dystopian thriller set in the year 2030 that sees the world in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

programme.title: Hangman
programme.desc: Mystery movie. American mystery, produced in 2017. Retired homicide detective Ray Archer and his partner, ex FBI agent Will Ruiney, are assigned to track down a vicious serial killer, who is playing a twisted version of the childrens game Hangman.

programme.title: Remembrance
programme.desc: Remembrance depicts a remarkable love story that blossomed amidst the terror of a German concentration camp in 1944 Poland. This impossible passion fuels the courage of a Polish prisoner who manages to rescue his Jewish girlfriend. Against all odds, they escape the camp and survive a treacherous journey to freedom. But during the chaos of the end of the war, they are forcibly separated and each is convinced that the other has died. More than thirty years later in New York, the happily married 52-year-old woman accidentally finds out that her former Polish lover is still alive. And she has to see him again.

programme.title: Modigliani
programme.desc: American drama, produced in 2004. An American, French, German, Italian, Rumanian, and British co-production. The story of Amedeo Modiglianis bitter rivalry with Pablo Picasso, and his tragic romance with Jeanne Hebuterne.

programme.title: Irish Jam
programme.desc: A South Central L.A. con artist with rap skills tries to keep bill collectors and his lover, with marriage in mind, at bay by entering a poetry contest staged by a small Irish town. Can his rhyming skills help the town and win him the prize money?

programme.title: Digging Into China
programme.desc: Harriet, a ten-year old girl, lives together with her big sister and her alcoholic mother out in the countryside. The family runs a motel. Harriet is different from the others, as she owns a great creativity and has nobody to play with. Her infinite world exists only in her mind. One day, Ricky comes along. He is a grown-up, but retarded son of an elderly lady. Soon, Harriet and Ricky share their experiences of life from a different point of view and become close friends. But his mother still plans to give Ricky away into professional care in a home, because she wont live forever to be there for him.

programme.title: House of the Stone Monkeys
programme.desc: The action proceeds along two tracks and two time frames. We meet the boy, who lives with his mother in a Budapest apartment house, in the summer of 2012. Another boy is spending his vacation with his grandparents in the same building in the summer of 1982. The house unveils its mysterious secret to both of them.

programme.title: Raspberry Magic
programme.desc: "Raspberry Magic" is a coming-of-age story about 11-year-old Monica Shah, who thinks she must win the science fair in order to bring her father back after he runs out on the family. She blames herself for her parents problems, and takes charge when her mother falls into a deep depression. Set behind the backdrop of a beautiful forest, Monicas experiment uses touch therapy to help raspberries grow faster. She asks, is it nature or nurture that can truly help a being grow? Does it even matter? Through her ups and downs with her family, she learns that its a complex question, and the answer isnt so simple.

programme.title: Owd Bob
programme.desc: The story of a young orphaned boy who is sent to live with his grandfather in Ireland. The boy finds adjusting to the country life challenging, but soon learns the life has its rewards as well.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: Donald P. Sinclair has placed six separate gold coins in different slot machines in his casino. The lucky six who find these coins discover an opportunity of a lifetime. The chance to own $2 million. Locked up in a locker in New Mexico, these six contestants must now race each other, to be the first to the cash. There are no rules in place and everything that could possibly happen, does. Whilst, behind the scenes, Sinclairs associates are placing their bets.

programme.title: North and South: The Battle of New Market
programme.desc: Based on a true story of the American Civil War, culminating at the Battle of New Market, May 1864. A group of teenage cadets sheltered from war at the Virginia Military Institute must confront the horrors of an adult world when they are called upon to defend the Shenandoah Valley. Leaving behind their youth, these cadets must decide what they are fighting for.

programme.title: The War Is Over
programme.desc: Following the bombardment of Kosovo in 1999, the Rahmanis and their three children emigrate to Switzerland. After years of living in their new homeland, the family faces the prospects of deportation. "No one is proud to be a refugee, but when it comes to me, I am not ashamed of who I am" says Rasim - the father of the family and an ex music teacher. Desperate to stay he invents an Albanian Dance Troupe in order to garner signatures of support from the community… The intimate narrative explores the experience of forced migration: the fraught decision to leave; the process of integration and adaptation to a new country; the impact on the family; and always, the yearning for the homeland.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The story of Barry Minkow, a young charismatic business man who becomes a wealthy CEO by lying, cheating and stealing his way to the top.

programme.title: Shoreditch
programme.desc: Set both on the eve of World War II in a shady Shoreditch nightclub and in present-day London. Thirtysomething Tom tries to solve a murder that was committed in the club decades before.

programme.title: Love Is Not Enough
programme.desc: Samir, must face his parents breakup. While they meet to find the way to tell him, the little Samir surprises them, because he knows perfectly whats happening, putting his own parents into a hard place with his vision of the situation.

programme.title: Cleanskin
programme.desc: Harry (Sam Douglas), a British people arms dealer, is seen in bed with a prostitute named Rena (Shivani Ghai). While toying with Harrys pistol, she unloads it but replaces the empty magazine. Harrys bodyguard Ewan (Sean Bean) is a British Secret Intelligence Service. Harry and Ewan travel to a bank, transporting a briefcase of Semtex. The men are followed by two terrorists, Ash (Abhin Galeya) and Ibrahim (Mens-Sana Tamakloe). Ibrahim approaches Harry and Ewan from the top of a staircase, shooting at them. After Ash shoots Ewan twice, Harry tries to shoot Ash, only to discover there are no bullets in his gun. Ash kills Harry and takes the briefcase of Semtex. However, Ewan manages to shoot Ash in the arm; but, before he can apprehend him, Ash returns fire and escapes with the briefcase.

programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: Action movie. After years of neglect, a building-landmark will be demolished with dynamite. What a few people know is that inside it hides the cash a gang leader stole from his rivals. Will the interested parties reach the treasure in time?

programme.title: Slackers
programme.desc: Dave Goodman, Sam Schecter, and Jeff Davis are best friends who have spent almost four years at Holden University scamming their way through college. During one exam scam in their final semester Dave discovers Angela, and asks her out while writing his phone number on her exam sheet. Ethan Dulles (who calls himself "Cool Ethan"), a classmate obsessed with Angela to the extent of collecting loose hairs and making a hair doll and having surveillance photos and a shrine to Angela setup in his dorm room, takes her exam question sheet after Angela leaves and uses it to repeatedly confront and then blackmail the guys into setting up a successful date with Angela for him in exchange for his silence on the matter. The guys set Ethan up in multiple situations in an attempt to convince Angela to like him, while Dave tells Sam during their work researching her that Angela is no more important to him as any other scam theyve done. Ethan fails to attract her after frequent confrontations based on his delusional behavior, immaturity and ignorance of social norms. Though Ethan seems a lonely harmless nerd, he is scheming, psychotically obsessive and hopelessly socially incompetent.

programme.title: Non-Stop: tiešais reiss
programme.desc: Spriedzes filma ar Laiemu Nīsonu un Džulianu Mūru. Transatlantiskā avioreisa Ņujorka - Londona laikā ASV aviācijas policijas priekšnieks Bils Marks saņem vairākas īsziņas ar prasību pārskaitīt 150 miljonus dolāru uz kādu ārzonu kontu. Pretējā gadījumā tiek draudēts ik pēc 20 minūtēm nogalināt kādu pasažieri. Kad atklājas, ka konts ir atvērts uz paša Marka vārda, viņš tiek turēts aizdomās par lidmašīnas nolaupīšanu.

programme.title: Guči nams
programme.desc: Filmas pamatā ir patiess stāsts par itāļu modes impēriju radījušo Guči dinastiju. Patrīcija Redžani ieprecas Guči ģimenē. Viņas nevaldāmā godkāre sāk graut dzimtas mantojumu, kā arī izraisa nodevības, pagrimuma un pat slepkavību virpuli. Filmas scenārijs veidots, balstoties uz 2001. gadā izdoto grāmatu "Guči nams: sensacionāls stāsts par slepkavību, ārprātu, greznību un alkatību". Galvenajās omās: Lady Gaga, Adams Draivers, Džeremijs Aironss, Als Pačino

programme.desc: Pastaiga sniegotā purvā

programme.title: Dona Žuana kaislības
programme.desc: Komisks stāsts par mūsdienu donžuānu, kurš aizraujas ar pornogrāfiju, meitenēm un pēc katras mīlas dēkas nekavējoties laižas lapās. Viņa jautrā un brīvā dzīve turpinās, līdz puisis sastop jaunu un skaistu atraitni.

programme.title: Dona Žuana kaislības
programme.desc: Komisks stāsts par mūsdienu donžuānu, kurš aizraujas ar pornogrāfiju, meitenēm un pēc katras mīlas dēkas nekavējoties laižas lapās. Viņa jautrā un brīvā dzīve turpinās, līdz puisis sastop jaunu un skaistu atraitni.

programme.title: Bēgšana no Šoušenkas
programme.desc: Filma ir par baņķieri Endiju Defrēnu, kam piespriesti divi mūža ieslodzījumi par sievas un viņas mīļākā nogalināšanu. Cietumā viņš sadraudzējas ar Elisu Boidu "Redu" Redingu, Defrēns jūtas drošībā pēc tam, kad viņa zināšanas finanšu nozarē izmanto cietuma darbinieki un ieslodzītie.

programme.title: Pirmsākums
programme.desc: Doms Kobbs ir augstas klases spiegošanas profesionālis, kurš spēj iegūt vērtīgu informāciju no cilvēkiem, iekļūstot viņu sapņu pasaulē. Būdams ļoti pieprasīts korporatīvajā spiegošanā, Kobbs kļuvis par starptautiska līmeņa bēgli, kuru vajā gan konkurenti, gan arī likumsargi. Piekritis veikt pēdējo uzdevumu, Kobbs ar savu palīgu grupu iekļūst kāda jauna biznesmeņa sapņos. Ejot cauri daudzajiem līmeņiem vizuāli iespaidīgajā sapņu pasaulē, Kobbs cenšas rast atbildes uz pagātnes notikumiem savā personīgajā dzīvē, kā arī ar jebkuriem līdzekļiem perfekti paveikt ideālu noziegumu. Galvenajās lomās: Leonardo di Kaprio, Džozefs Gordons Levits, Eliots Peidžs.

programme.title: Linkolns
programme.desc: ASV Pilsoņu karš tuvojas noslēgumam. Prezidents Ābrams Linkolns ir apņēmies panākt nozīmīga konstitūcijas labojuma pieņemšanu, lai uz visiem laikiem aizliegtu verdzību ASV. Tomēr laika to panākt ir maz, jo kuru katru brīdi karš var beigties. Ja tas notiks pirms labojuma pieņemšanas, dienvidu štati nepieļaus, lai tas iegūst likuma spēku. Izmantojot visus iespējamos līdzekļus, Linkolnam nepakļāvīgajā Kongresā jāiegūst pietiekami daudz balsis, pirms karš beidzas, un visas pūles izrādās veltas.

programme.title: Bēgšana no Šoušenkas

programme.title: 3 dienas, lai nogalinātu
programme.desc: Šajā spraigajā asa sižeta filmā Kevins Kostners atveido bīstamu starptautisko spiegu, kurš ir apņēmies pamest savu riskanto darbu, lai beidzot veidotu tuvākas attiecības ar sievu un meitu, no kurām viņš ir atsvešinājies viņu drošības dēļ. Tomēr viņam jāizpilda pēdējais uzdevums. Vai viņš spēs atrast pasaules nežēlīgāko teroristu un vienlaikus sievas prombūtnes laikā pirmo reizi pieskatīt savu meitu, kura jau ir pusaudze?

programme.title: Mančestra pie jūras
programme.desc: Pēc sava brāļa pēkšņās nāves Lī Čandlers kļūst par brāļadēla aizgādni un ir spiests atgriezties dzimtajā miestā, kur viņu jau gaida bijusī sieva (Mišela Viljamsa) un tik rūpīgi slēptā un aizmirstā pagātne. Kinofilma saņēmusi vairākas nominācijas vadošajos pasaules kino festivālos. Galvenās lomas atveidotājs Keisijs Afleks par Lī lomu saņēma "Oskaru", bet aktrise Mišela Viljamsa saņēma "Oskara" nomināciju.

programme.title: Apšaude
programme.desc: Spriedzes komēdija, Lielbritānija, 2016. / Režisors: Bens Vitlijs / Lomās: Enco Čilenti, Sems Railijs, Maikls Smailijs, Brī Larsone. Bostona, 1978.gads. Kad nelegālā ieroču tirdzniecība izgāžas, ieroču noliktava pārvēršas kaujas laukā. Vārdiem vairs nav vietas, jo runā stobri. Izdzīvošanas spēles galveno balvu, koferi ar milzu naudu, aiznest nav vienkārši. Apbruņoti ir visi, katrs cīnās par sevi un haoss valda pāri visam…

programme.title: Septiņas artērijas
programme.desc: Ievērojamai teātra režisorei dots uzdevums atjaunot sava bijušā mentora slavenāko darbu — operu "Salome". Dažas satraucošas atmiņas no pagātnes liks apspiestajai traumai iekrāsot tagadni.

programme.title: Ķīniešu mīkla
programme.desc: Kzavjē dzīve ir sarežģītāka nekā jebkad iepriekš. Viņš ir rakstnieks, dzīvo Parīzē kopā ar savu bērnu māti Vendiju, kura pēc ceļojuma uz Ņujorku paziņo, ka vēlas šķirties, jo satikusi kādu citu. Parīzē dzīvo arī Kzavjē draudzene Izabella, kura ir kopā ar ķīniešu izcelsmes amerikānieti. Sievietes vēlas bērnu un pierunā Kzavjē kļūt par spermas donoru, pirms pašas pārvāksies uz Ņujorku. Kad arī Vendija paziņo, ka kopā ar bērniem pārvāksies uz Ņujorku pie vīrieša, ar kuru nesen iepazinās, Kzavjē saprot, ka viņam nav izvēles - ja visi viņa bērni būs Ņujorkā, arī viņam jādodas turp.

programme.title: Ofēlija
programme.desc: Filmā "Ofēlija", kas veidota pēc Lisas Klainas romāna, Ofēlija, slavenā Šekspīra lugas "Hamlets" varone, vēsta savu versiju par to, kā patiesībā risinājās lugā aprakstītie notikumi. Ofēliju, dumpīgo, bez mātes augušo meiteni, pieņem audzināšanā karaliene Ģertrūde. Viņā iemīlas Ģertrūdes dēls princis Hamlets, un viņi slepus apprecas laikā, kad Dānijas karaļvalsti apdraud norvēģu iebrukums un galma iekšienē vērptās intrigas. Ofēlijai un Hamletam ir jāizvēlas starp mīlestību un atriebības alkām.

programme.title: Būt par Flinnu
programme.desc: Strādājot Bostonas bezpajumtnieku patversmē, Niks Flinns sastapies ar savu tēvu - krāpnieku un pašpasludinātu rakstnieku. Jūtot problēmas paša dzīvē, Niks nolemj no jauna uzmeklēt savu radinieku.

programme.title: Ķīniešu mīkla

programme.title: Būt par Flinnu
programme.desc: Strādājot Bostonas bezpajumtnieku patversmē, Niks Flinns sastapies ar savu tēvu - krāpnieku un pašpasludinātu rakstnieku. Jūtot problēmas paša dzīvē, Niks nolemj no jauna uzmeklēt savu radinieku.

programme.title: Ofēlija
programme.desc: Filmā "Ofēlija", kas veidota pēc Lisas Klainas romāna, Ofēlija, slavenā Šekspīra lugas "Hamlets" varone, vēsta savu versiju par to, kā patiesībā risinājās lugā aprakstītie notikumi. Ofēliju, dumpīgo, bez mātes augušo meiteni, pieņem audzināšanā karaliene Ģertrūde. Viņā iemīlas Ģertrūdes dēls princis Hamlets, un viņi slepus apprecas laikā, kad Dānijas karaļvalsti apdraud norvēģu iebrukums un galma iekšienē vērptās intrigas. Ofēlijai un Hamletam ir jāizvēlas starp mīlestību un atriebības alkām.

programme.title: Rozā sapņos
programme.desc: Stāsts par mīlestību fantāzijas pilnā pasaulē, kur mīļotie uz satikšanos lido rozā mākoņos un dejo grieztos, kur parastā dzīvoklī dzīvo saule un peles sarunājas ar kaķiem, kur ziedi aug cilvēkos un sirds siltums spēj iznīcināt visnāvējošākos ieročus.

programme.title: Beigu sajūta
programme.desc: Vīrieti sāk vajāt pagātne - viņš saņem noslēpumainu mantojumu, kas liek viņam pārdomāt savu pašreizējo dzīves situāciju.

programme.title: Tālu no trokšņainā pūļa
programme.desc: Viktorijas laikmeta Anglijā neatkarīgā un stūrgalvīgā Batšeba Everdena ir lepna un skaista sieviete, kura piesaista triju dažādiem sabiedrības slāņiem piederošu vīriešu uzmanību. Pēc Batšebas tikšanās ar aitu fermas īpašnieku Gabriēlu Ouku pārgalvīgo seržantu Frensisu Troju un turīgo vecpuisi Viljamu Boldvudu, viņu dzīves vairs nekad nebūs tādas, kā iepriekš.

programme.title: Rozā sapņos
programme.desc: Stāsts par mīlestību fantāzijas pilnā pasaulē, kur mīļotie uz satikšanos lido rozā mākoņos un dejo grieztos, kur parastā dzīvoklī dzīvo saule un peles sarunājas ar kaķiem, kur ziedi aug cilvēkos un sirds siltums spēj iznīcināt visnāvējošākos ieročus.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Bake It til You Make It
programme.desc: Food Network ditches the studio to follow seven gifted amateur bakers. Theyre hitting the road to submit their best desserts in baking competitions across America, all while pursuing the sweetest taste in the world: victory.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Harry Potter: Wizards of Baking
programme.desc: James and Oliver Phelps host as pairs of professional bakers create spellbinding edible showpieces on the actual Harry Potter film sets. Guest actors from the films share behind-the-scenes experiences as they join judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef.

programme.title: Harry Potter: Wizards of Baking
programme.desc: James and Oliver Phelps host as pairs of professional bakers create spellbinding edible showpieces on the actual Harry Potter film sets. Guest actors from the films share behind-the-scenes experiences as they join judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth Poett celebrates springtime on the ranch! She harvests fresh honey to use in honey lemon cake and lemon buttermilk fried chicken.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth bakes a hummingbird breakfast cake to help fuel the cowboy crew. Later, she serves brisket sandwiches out of the tailgate of her pickup truck.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth prepares a special barbecue dinner for her family visiting the ranch. She makes fresh baked herb focaccia with edible flowers and BBQ pork ribs.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth Poett catches and serves fresh fish for a date night with her husband, complete with lemon dill sauce, saffron rice and ricotta cookies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: Outchefd
programme.desc: Cheesy Faceoff. Eddie Jackson surprises program manager and home cook Marcus with a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to go up against master chef Antonia Lofaso.

programme.title: Outchefd
programme.desc: Bye Bye Bison. Eddie Jackson hosts a big game showdown between nurse practitioner Robin and celebrity chef Joe Sasto. Will Robin secure the win and bring home 5,000 dollars?

programme.title: Outchefd
programme.desc: Hog Wild. Home cook Luke aims to walk away with 5,000 dollars when he goes head-to-head against chef Maneet Chauhan in a battle with pork as the star ingredient.

programme.title: Outchefd
programme.desc: Risotto Royale. Software consultant Tommy Ranucci must prove hes great with grains when he faces off against his childhood hero, Chef Andrew Zimmern.

programme.title: Magnolia Table: At the Farm
programme.desc: Magnolia Table: At the Farm, Joanna welcomes viewers into her home to share cherished family recipes and seasonal favorites – from quick snacks to Sunday treats. Along the way, she offers helpful cooking tips, celebrates the beauty of fresh ingredients, and invites audiences to enjoy the simple pleasures of time spent in some of her favorite spaces around the farm.

programme.title: Magnolia Table: At the Farm

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay V. Symon
programme.desc: Join our hosts, renowned celebrity chefs and restaurateurs Bobby Flay and Michael Symon, as they test the skills of eight expert barbecue connoisseurs. Filmed at the Star Hill Ranch in Austin, Texas, the eight chefs are divided into two teams but, in order to claim first pick for their team, Bobby and Michael go head-to-head in a backyard BBQ challenge. Each episode sees one of the chefs being eliminated from the show until there is only one left, the winner who is awarded the title of Master of Cue. The weekly contests aim to reveal the chefs talents and expose their weaknesses and include tasks such as cooking up a tomahawk rib-eye and taking on a Texas beef challenge.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Host Laila Ali challenges chefs to settle their disputes in a single round, head-to-head culinary battle. They all come here to call each other out, put their favorite knives on the line, and bury the hatchet. The winners walk out with $10,000 cash, a prized knife from the losing chefs knife roll and bragging rights for life!

programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits fired-up favourites. They include hot pizza in Boulder, CO, tasty turnovers in Mesa, AZ, and bomb BBQ in Memphis, TN.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri digs in diner style with mighty mac n cheese in Atlanta, brisket hash in San Antonio and a supreme breakfast burrito in Scottsdale, AZ.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible
programme.desc: Seventh-Inning Stress. Its Healthcare Worker Appreciation Night in Albuquerque, New Mexico, and Robert Irvine is tasked with serving an elevated dinner to 250 deserving guests.

programme.title: Bobbys Triple Threat
programme.desc: Bryan Voltaggio is desperate to take down his brother, Titan Michael Voltaggio, along with the rest of the Titans to win $25,000.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits fired-up favourites. They include hot pizza in Boulder, CO, tasty turnovers in Mesa, AZ, and bomb BBQ in Memphis, TN.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri digs in diner style with mighty mac n cheese in Atlanta, brisket hash in San Antonio and a supreme breakfast burrito in Scottsdale, AZ.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: News reports
programme.desc: The program delivers comprehensive reports on current events, providing viewers with detailed information on politics, society, economy, and culture. Episodes present facts clearly and objectively, offering analysis and context to help audiences understand complex issues. By following the program, viewers stay informed about local and global developments, gain insight into ongoing events, and make sense of important news with accuracy and reliability.

programme.title: Fuhrer 2.0
programme.desc: Is history repeating itself before our eyes? A documentary examines the shocking similarities between two dictators, Adolf Hitler and Vladimir Putin. Despite a 66-year age gap, their methods are identical: from the suppression of freedoms and nationalist propaganda to bloody wars of aggression. The filmmakers explore how childhood trauma and domestic violence shaped the characters of future tyrants, and compare their military strategies—from the devastation of World War II to modern aggression in Ukraine, Georgia, and Syria. A deep psychological portrait of those who brought the world to the brink of disaster.

programme.title: Laipnības veidi
programme.desc: Ofisa darbinieks, kurš visu privāto dzīvi plāno pēc mīļotā bosa norādēm, reiz nolemj vairs nepakļauties. Policists cenšas pārdzīvot sievas bezvēsts pazušanu, bet, kad viņa atgriežas, uzskata, ka tā ir sveša persona. Uz seksu un sālīta ūdens balstīta sekta sava guru uzdevumā meklē sievieti, kura būtu spējīga augšāmcelt mirušos.

programme.title: Iesācēja
programme.desc: Studente Aleksa vēlas būt pirmā it visā. Viņa piesakās universitātes airēšanas komandā, un pavisam drīz viņai rodas iespēja pārbaudīt savas fiziskās un psiholoģiskās spējas.

programme.title: Absolūtā patiesība
programme.desc: 17 gadus vecais Maiks Lesiters apsūdzēts sava turīgā tēva slepkavībā. Lai gan pierādījumi pret apsūdzēto ir šķietami neapgāžami, viņa aizstāvības advokāts Ričards Remzijs gatavs darīt visu, lai Maiku attaisnotu. Ar jaunās advokātes Dženelas palīdzību viņš dara visu iespējamo, lai noskaidrotu, kas īsti notika slepkavības dienā.

programme.title: Imigrante
programme.desc: 1921. gads. Nevainīga imigrante ar viltu tiek iemānīta burlesku un vodeviļas pasaulē, līdz kāds žilbinošs burvju mākslinieks mēģina viņu glābt un palīdz atrast sievietes māsu, kas tiek turēta karantīnā Elisa salā.

programme.title: Rio
programme.desc: Animācijas filmas "Ledus laikmets" veidotāji sagatavojuši jaunu piedzīvojumu komēdiju visai ģimenei. Blū ir pieradināts papagailis, kas tā arī nav iemācījies lidot. Viņš visu mūžu baudījis ērtības Minesotas štata mazpilsētā, kur dzīvo kopā ar savu saimnieci Lindu. Blū un Linda ir pārliecināti, ka viņš ir pēdējais savas sugas pārstāvis, taču, kad izrādās, ka Riodežaneiro dzīvo arī krāšņā Džuela, abi dodas uz turieni, lai viņu uzmeklētu. Jau drīz vien pēc ierašanās Blū un Džuelu nolaupa eksotisko dzīvnieku tirgotāji. Taču Džuela ir radusi pie dzīves pilsētas ielās, un ar vairāku runājošu putnu palīdzību viņiem izdodas tikt brīvībā. Draugu un Džuelas iedrošināts, Blū beidzot iemācīsies lidot, lai varētu atgriezties pie savas labākās draudzenes Lindas.

programme.title: Tauriņa stāsts
programme.desc: Tuvojoties ziemai, monarhu tauriņi migrē uz dienvidiem, lai pārziemotu siltumā. Taču Patrika spārni vēl nav gatavi tālajam ceļam un viņš nevar lidot. Nedomādams padoties, Patriks kopā ar savu labāko draugu kāpuru Mārtiju paslēpjas pārtikas treilerī, kuru velk Dženifera. Tomēr arī viņai ir savas bažas par ceļojumu, jo - tauriņam neierasti - viņu māc bailes no augstuma. Visus trīs gaida daudz piedzīvojumu un sūri gūtu mācību, līdz mērķis būs sasniegts.

programme.title: Kentervilas spoks
programme.desc: Sera Saimona de Kentervila rēgs jau 300 gadus klīst pa savrupmāju, meklēdams drosmīgu pēcnācēju, kurš viņu varētu atbrīvot no Kentervila lāsta. Kad šajā savrupmājā ievācas kāda amerikāņu ģimene, spokam parādās cerību stariņš beidzot tapt atbrīvotam.

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Mīlīgā mazpilsētiņā atrodas melna māja ar nedzīvu zālāju. Kaimiņi pat nenojauš, ka zem mājas atrodas milzu paslēptuve. Sīku pakalpiņu armijas apsargāts, Grū kaldina plānus lielākajai laupīšanai pasaules vēsturē. Viņš ir iecerējis nolaupīt Mēnesi. Jā, Mēnesi! Grū patīk viss ļaunais. Bruņojies ar samazināšanas lāzeru, sasaldēšanas staru un dažnedažādiem kaujas transporta līdzekļiem braukšanai pa zemi un pa gaisu, viņš iznīdē visu, kas gadās ceļā, līdz kādu dienu sastop trīs bārenītes ar apbrīnojamu gribasspēku…

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Kamēr bijušais dižais ļaundaris Gru sāk iejusties ģimenes cilvēka lomā un mēģina godīgi pelnīt iztiku, pārdodot ievārījumu, Antarktīdā kāds nozog slepenu laboratoriju. Ļaunuma apkarošanas organizācijai ir nepieciešama palīdzība, un tās pārstāvji ierodas pie Gru. Kopā ar organizācijas ekscentrisko aģenti Lūsiju Vaildu viņš secina, ka galvenais aizdomās turamais ir par mirušu uzskatītais supernelietis El Mačo, kura dēls ir ieskatījies Gru vecākajā meitā Margo. Pārlieka vēlēšanās pasargāt meitas un arvien pieaugošās simpātijas pret Lūsiju aizmiglo Gru prātu, tādēļ meklējumi nevedas. Tikmēr kāds nelietis paklusām nolaupa Gru palīgus.

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Superļaundaris Gru ir izmests no darba, jo neapturēja jaunāko cilvēces apdraudētāju. Viņš zaudē dzīvesprieku, bet to atgūst, kad uzzina, ka viņa neredzētais dvīņubrālis Dru vēlas viņu satikt. Gru ar ģimeni dodas uz brāļa grezno dzīvesvietu. Brāļi kopā uzsāks cīņu pret Baltazaru Bretu, kurš bērnībā bija slavenība, taču tagad kļuvis par superļaundari, kurš terorizē pasauli. Minioni uzsāk protesta streiku pret to, ka Gru vispār neinteresē iespēja valdīt pār pasauli.

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Grū ģimenē ir papildinājums - Grū juniors. Kad tētis Grū sastopas ar jaunu ienaidnieku – atriebīgo Maksimu Lemālu un viņa liktenīgo sievieti Valentīnu –, visa ģimene ir spiesta atstāt mājas, doties uz slepeno mītni skaistajā Meifloverā un mēģināt iekļauties vietējā sabiedrībā zem slepena vārda. Taču te ir kāds, kas zina, kas patiesībā ir Grū, un piedzīvojumi var sākties!

programme.title: Bridžitas Džounsas mazulis
programme.desc: Bridžitai Džounsai (Renē Zelvēgere) paliek 43 gadi, un viņas māte Pamela (Džemma Džounsa) atgādina, ka bioloģiskais pulkstenis tikšķ. Apmeklējot kāda drauga bēres, kurš gājis bojā lidmašīnas katastrofā, viņa satiek savu bijušo – Marku Darsiju (Kolins Fērts), kurš ir kopā ar sievu Kamillu (Agni Skota). Pēc bēru ceremonijas viņa dodas uz pašreizējo darbu, kurā strādā par draudzenes un TV diktores Mirandas (Sāra Solemani) producenti. Viņa uzaicina Bridžitu nosvinēt neseno dzimšanas dienu, taču Bridžita atsaka, jo grasās to svinēt ar draugiem. Taču viņa paliek viena, jo visi draugi ir aizņemti ar saviem bērniem. Viņa bēdīga pieņem Mirandas piedāvājumu, un abas dodas uz mūzikas festivālu. Nepaiet ilgs laiks, līdz Bridžita ar seju iekrīt dubļos, taču viņai palīdz glīts svešinieks. Vēlāk festivāla laikā viņa piedzeras un nokļūst nepareizajā teltī, pārsteigta satiekot vīrieti, kurš viņai palīdzēja. Viņiem ir sekss. Nākamajā rītā viņa klusām aizlavās. Bridžita dodas uz kristībām, kurās viņa ir krustmāte un Marks ir krusttēvs. Viņš atklāj Bridžitai, ka šķirsies ar Kamillu. Viņiem ir sekss. Tad viņa atceras, ka viņš vienmēr darbu vērtēja augstāk par abu attiecībām, un no rīta klusām aizlavās, pirms viņš ir pamodies. Kad Bridžita pamana, ka pieņemas svarā, viņas draudzene Šazera (Sallija Filipsa) pārliecina veikt grūtniecības testu. Tests ir pozitīvs. Strādājot pie raidījuma, viņa pamana svešinieku no festivāla un pārsteigta uzzina, ka viņš ir miljardieris Džeks Kvants (Patriks Dempsijs). Viņa tam atklāj, ka ir stāvoklī. Neskatoties uz sākotnējo šoku, Džeks apsola viņu atbalstīt. To pašu pasaka Markam, kurš ir sajūsmā, ka kļūs par tēvu. Bridžita uzaicina Džeku uz pasākumu, un atklāj, ka tajā piedalās arī Marks. Abi vīrieši labi saprotas, un viņi visi kopā dodas vakariņās. Viņa atklāj, ka jebkurš no tiem var būt tēvs. Džeks to uztver labi, taču Marks aiziet. Mēnešiem ritot, Marks atjauno sakarus. Kļūdas dēļ Bridžita pamet darbu. Kā bezdarbniece viņa nomākta klīst pa lietu...

programme.title: Ferdinands
programme.desc: Ferdinands ir pats labsirdīgākais bullis visā Spānijā. Neskatoties uz iespaidīgajiem izmēriem un milzu spēku, viņš jau kopš bērnības neizrādīja sevišķu interesi par badīšanos ar saviem sugas brāļiem. Nejaušības dēļ Ferdinands nokļūst to vidū, kuri tiek izvēlēti, lai piedalītos buļļu cīņās Madridē. Tagad Ferdinandam nāksies aizstāvēt savus miermīlīgos dzīves uzskatus un atgādināt pārējiem, ka grūtību priekšā galvenais ir palikt, kāds tu esi. Jo tikai tā tu spēsi izmainīt pasauli sev apkārt.

programme.title: Grēku atlaišana
programme.desc: Novecojošs gangsteris cenšas sakārtot savu dzīvi un izlīgt ar pagātni.

programme.title: Adaptācija
programme.desc: Pazīstams dramaturgs Čārlijs Kaufmans (Nikolass Keidžs) saņem pasūtījumu uzrakstīt filmas scenāriju pēc grāmatas "Orhideju zaglis" motīviem. Tajā žurnāliste Sūzena Orleāna (Merila Strīpa) apraksta avantūristu Džonu Laroču, kas ir tiesāts par īpašu orhideju zādzību no rezervāta. Nespēdams izdomāt scenārijam adekvātu sižeta noslēgumu Čārlijs piekrīt dvīņubrāļa piedāvājumam izsekot žurnālisti. Izrādās, ka grāmatā aprakstītie notikumi ievērojami atšķiras no realitātes un ziedu zagšanai ir pavisam citi iemesli. Sūzena izrādās iesaistījusies avantūrista Laroča dzīvē vairāk nekā parasta vērotāja no malas.

programme.title: After. Laimīgi mūžu mūžos
programme.desc: Kad atklājas šokējoša patiesība par abu ģimenēm, mīlētāji atklāj, ka nemaz nav tik atšķirīgi viens no otra. Tesa vairs nav jaukā, vienkāršā, labā meitene, kura satika Hardinu, un Hardins vairs nav tas zēns, kurā viņa kādreiz iemīlējās.

programme.title: After. Uz visiem laikiem
programme.desc: Pēc šķiršanās no savas dzīves patiesās mīlestības bestselleru autors Hardins Skots ceļo uz Portugāli, lai izlīdzinātu savus pagātnes nodarījumus.

programme.title: Rio
programme.desc: Blū, Pērle un viņu trīs bērni dzīvo mājas idillē burvīgajā Riodežaneiro pilsētā. Kad Pērle nolemj, ka bērniem jāmācās dzīvot īstu putnu dzīvi, viņa uzstāj, ka ģimenei jādodas uz Amazoni. Blū, cenšoties sadraudzēties ar jaunajiem kaimiņiem, baidās zaudēt Pērli un bērnus, kuri ļaujas savvaļas dzīves aicinājumam.

programme.title: X+Y
programme.desc: Zēns, matemātikas ģēnijs ar saskarsmes grūtībām dzīvē un vienaudžu vidū, rod pašpārliecību un jaunus draugus starp britu skolēnu komandas biedriem Starptautiskajā matemātikas olimpiādē.

programme.title: Kapteinis Zobenzobs un burvju briljants
programme.desc: Ļaunais princis Megans Hans no džungļiem un Karību jūras pirāts kapteinis Zobenzobs jau sen dzen maģiskā briljanta pēdas. Tas nav parasts dārgakmens. Pusnaktī tas spēj piepildīt viskvēlāko vēlēšanos, lai kāda tā būtu. Visi meklējumi "kaķim zem astes", taču tad, klejodams pa džungļiem, burvju dārgakmeni nejauši ierauga mazais Marks.

programme.title: Dogmens
programme.desc: Kad uzticīgais policijas suns un viņa saimnieks dežūras laikā gūst ievainojumus, ārsti paveic dzīvību glābjošu operāciju, un no viņiem abiem top viens - atjautīgais Dogmens! Viņš dod svinīgo policista zvērestu aizsargāt un kalpot. Tikko Dogmens sāk pildīt policista uzdevumus un cenšas atstāt labu iespaidu uz priekšnieku, viņam tiek sarežģīts uzdevums - jāaptur superļaundara kaķa Pītija varenais plāns.

programme.title: Eliots: pats mazākais ziemeļbriedis
programme.desc: Eliots ir mazs zirdziņš, kuram ir ļoti liels sapnis, - ieņemt godpilno vietu Ziemassvētku vecīša ziemeļbriežu pajūgā, lai dāvātu bērniem prieku svētkos. Pēc tam kad Ziemassvētku vecītis nāk klajā ar paziņojumu, ka tūlīt dosies pensija, mazajam Eliotam atliek vien tikai trīs dienas, lai pieradītu pārējiem, ka viņš ir šī goda cienīgs, neskatoties uz to, ka viņam nav atbilstošu ragu. Ja kaut ko ļoti vēlies no visas sirds, tad brīnumi notiek, vai ne?

programme.title: Misija: Izglābt tīģeri
programme.desc: Jauns supervaronis iedraudzējas ar apdraudētu tīģeri, ko sastapis piknika laikā mežā, un uzsāk drosmīgu glābšanas misiju.

programme.title: Mis Moksi
programme.desc: Mis Moksi, pieradināta kaķenīte, brīvdienu laikā apmaldās, un viņai nākas atrast ceļu atpakaļ uz mājām, ceļojot cauri Dienvideiropai kopā ar, kaķa skatījumā, visnepatīkamākajām radībām, kādas vien iespējamas, – komisku suni un vecu, gudru putnu. Šī ceļojuma laikā viņa paplašina savu skatījumu uz dzīvi un atklāj patieso draudzības nozīmi.

programme.title: Ēnu spēle
programme.desc: Treviss Bloks ir FIB problēmu risinātājs. Kad slepenie aģenti nonāk nepatikšanās, Treviss tiek izsaukts, lai viņus izpestītu. Par katru cenu. Taču, kad viens no slepenajiem aģentiem apšauba savas priekšniecības patiesos mērķus, Treviss nonāk asiņainas sazvērestības epicentrā.

programme.title: After. Pēc mūsu tikšanās
programme.desc: Tesa pavada pirmo dienu prestižā universitātē. Jaunas sejas, vide, grāmatas, kopmītne, universitātes gaiteņi nupat lielisku mācību gada sākumu, patstāvību un ambiciozu mērķi.Taču dzīve ir pilna dažkārt neparedzamu pavērsienu. Pirmā tikšanās ar istabas biedreni Stefu ierauj Tesu studentu dzīves virpulī ar garām naktīm un Hārdinu. Kopā būšana izvēršas par traku piedzīvojumu, taču šķietami skaistajā stāstā apslēpts drūms noslēpums. Kad tas nāks gaismā, Tesas dzīve vairs nebūs tāda kā agrāk.

programme.title: Bridžita Džounsa: Kā traka pēc viņa
programme.desc: Bridžita atkal ir viena un audzina 9 gadus veco Billiju un 4 gadus veco Meibelu. Iestrēgusi emocionālā nestabilitātē, viņa audzina bērnus ar uzticīgā drauga un bijušā mīļākā Daniela Klīvera palīdzību. Taču tad viņas dzīvē negaidīti uzrodas vēl kāds vīrietis.

programme.title: Adaptācija
programme.desc: Pazīstams dramaturgs Čārlijs Kaufmans (Nikolass Keidžs) saņem pasūtījumu uzrakstīt filmas scenāriju pēc grāmatas "Orhideju zaglis" motīviem. Tajā žurnāliste Sūzena Orleāna (Merila Strīpa) apraksta avantūristu Džonu Laroču, kas ir tiesāts par īpašu orhideju zādzību no rezervāta. Nespēdams izdomāt scenārijam adekvātu sižeta noslēgumu Čārlijs piekrīt dvīņubrāļa piedāvājumam izsekot žurnālisti. Izrādās, ka grāmatā aprakstītie notikumi ievērojami atšķiras no realitātes un ziedu zagšanai ir pavisam citi iemesli. Sūzena izrādās iesaistījusies avantūrista Laroča dzīvē vairāk nekā parasta vērotāja no malas.

programme.title: After. Pēc kritiena
programme.desc: Tesa ir gatava jaunam dzīves posmam. Spožais prestižas koledžas diploms paver jaunas iespējas – meitene atrod sapņu darbu starptautiskā kompānijā. Viņas nodoms pārcelties uz Sietlu nemaz neiepriecina Hārdinu. Viņa neapmierinātība, pārmetumi un mūžīgā greizsirdība sāpīgi ievaino Tesu un rada bažas. Vai ir vērts visu likt uz kārts un upurēt daudzsološu karjeru? Taču kā lai aizmirst kopā pavadītās naktis un kaislīgos skūpstus, viņa ciešos vīrieša apskāvienus un tuvību, kas padara traku?

programme.title: Pasaules gala mednieki
programme.desc: Pēc tam kad milzīga saules uzliesmojuma dēļ tiek iznīcināta Zemes austrumu puslode, drosmīgs algots dārgumu mednieks dodas uz Eiropu, lai atrastu iekāroto "Monu Lizu", taču drīz saprot, ka pasaulei šobrīd vajag varoni vairāk nekā gleznu.

programme.title: LaLiga. Real Oviedo - Atletico Madrid
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Cīņu sports: One Championship. ONE Friday Fights
programme.desc: ONE Championship is a mixed martial arts (MMA) organization that showcases world-class fighters from across the globe. With a focus on martial arts values and a commitment to integrity, the league promotes adrenaline-pumping, action-packed fights that entertain and inspire fans worldwide. ONE Championship not only showcases the skills of elite fighters, but also highlights the cultural aspects of martial arts, making it a unique and captivating sporting experience.

programme.title: NBA. Warriors - Lakers
programme.desc: The National Basketball Association composes of thirty teams across North America for men who are professional in this specific sport. Due to its popularity, this is one of four major professional sport leagues available in the United States of America and Canada. UFC. Brandon Moreno-Loneer Kavanagh
programme.desc: Martial Arts based TV programme. UFC stands for the Ultimate Fighting Championship which is an American mixed martial arts (MMA) promotion company based in Las Vegas that is owned by William Morris Endeavour.The purpose of UFC fighting was to establish the most effective martial art in a contest that had no weight classes and minimal rules that were as follows: no biting, hair pulling, groin shots and eye gouging. Legendary fighters well known for their ability to win in UFC fighting are Anderson Silva, Brock Lesnar, Connor McGregor and Ken Shamrock. Womens MMA has seen Ronda Rousey defend her title from 2012 to 2015 before she was defeated by Holly Holm another belt holder in more than one martial art.

programme.title: LaLiga. Real Madrid - Getafe
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: Busy professionals and parents search for a remote waterfront home in Rangeley, Maine. But shes more concerned about wild animals.

programme.title: Fix My Frankenhouse
programme.desc: Boston-based home renovation experts and husband-wife team Mike and Denese Butler fix what they refer to as "Frankenstein" houses. These are older homes that have become filled with wonky layouts, misplaced staircases and maze-like hallways as different owners make changes over the years. Mike employs his construction know-how to create a functional flow, while Denese will capture the clients style with custom finishes. By blending elements of the older homes charm with modern design, the couple will produce stunning and cohesive spaces. Throughtout the episodes, Mike and Denese will overcome choppy rooms and wasted square footage for clients and work with their dads -- master carpenters John Butler and Peter Doyle -- to deliver one-of-a-kind projects for each family.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: After raising their family in Northern California, a couples ready to relocate to Southern California for waterfront living opportunities.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: A couple sells their Idaho property to find an equivalent waterfront home near their two daughters in Show Low, Arizona.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A young marine engineer works months at a time at sea and loves Johns Island, 15 minutes off Charleston, abundant outdoor life; he wants a house with easy access to work, space for roommates and a garage for his motorcycles.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: An active couple is moving from Charleston, SC, to Pensacola Beach, FL. They want to spend their free time boating and riding jet skis, so theyre looking for a home with a boat dock just outside their back door.

programme.title: Bahamas Life
programme.desc: The idyllic Bahamas are the perfect getaway for travellers and vacationers alike, but for some, once you visit the paradisaical islands, its hard to forget their beauty. These enamored individuals drop their city lives for these stunning Caribbean shores, leaving their livelihoods, stresses and struggles behind. In each episode of Bahamas Life, we detail the processes involved, the choice of islands and the remarkable real estate opportunities for prospective buyers looking to fulfill their dreams.

programme.title: Bahamas Life
programme.desc: The idyllic Bahamas are the perfect getaway for travellers and vacationers alike, but for some, once you visit the paradisaical islands, its hard to forget their beauty. programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Real estate consultants and twin sisters Leslie Davis and Lyndsay Lamb have a knack for helping desperate homeowners sell their lifeless homes. After visiting nearby comparables, the sisters make the necessary, impactful renovations that convert these unlovable houses into diamonds in the rough.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Real estate consultants and twin sisters Leslie Davis and Lyndsay Lamb have a knack for helping desperate homeowners sell their lifeless homes. After visiting nearby comparables, the sisters make the necessary, impactful renovations that convert these unlovable houses into diamonds in the rough.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Bargain Block follows home renovation experts and partners Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas on their journey to restore Detroits iconic American neighborhoods one house at a time. With sound advice and support from their friend—lifetime Detroit resident and real estate expert Shea Hicks-Whitfield, who is expecting her first child—Keith and Evan buy multiple rundown and abandoned houses on a single block, take them down to the studs, and create affordable, stylish and fully furnished starter homes that are ideal for first-time homebuyers. Now settled in the Motor City, the couple, who have renovated and purchased their own home and opened a new retail store and workshop, infuse every property with a functional layout, artful design and beautiful repurposed furniture. The end result is incredible transformations of dilapidated homes that are an inspiration to the entire neighborhood.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Alisons Dream Home
programme.desc: After ten months of building, Alison is close to having a place of her own in Chicago. However, to finish the job she needs to find more money.

programme.desc: Facing obstacles at every turn, such as unexpected construction delays and dilapidated interiors, Tarek El Moussa will help these flipping newcomers navigate costly mistakes as they race to get a renovated property on the market.

Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple is leaving the mountains and cold of Boone, NC, behind for a new job in sunny Key West, FL. Theyre excited to embrace eclectic charm of the island, but they will have to chose between character and convenience.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A single mom wants to trade the New Jersey traffic for a bike commute on Key West. Shes hoping to find a turnkey home with a big backyard, while her six-year-olds wish list includes a pool, a beach and boat.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: After years of vacationing on Topsail Island, NC, an NYC family is ready to start living the island life full-time. The calm and relaxing beaches are a breath of fresh air, and flexible careers are making this dream a reality.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Empty nesters who have been visiting Topsail Island, North Carolina, for more than 20 years are ready to relocate permanently. Their hometown is becoming congested, so its the perfect time to make the move to an oceanfront condo.

programme.title: Renovation Goldmine
programme.desc: "Old is gold" is the mantra behind every custom home renovation in the new HGTV series, Renovation Goldmine. Chicagos Joe and Meg Piercy, owners of a successful design and renovation business, are dedicated to repurposing the goldmine of treasures found in clients homes. In each episode, the duo will revive old furniture and other pieces their clients already own and use the money saved to give families their dream home renovation.

programme.title: Renovation Goldmine

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt are a formidable husband and wife team. The married couple utilise Brians developing background and Mikas real estate experience to help clients design and build their perfect home in just 100 days. Based in Tampa, Florida, the formidable pair help local residents realise their dreams, and do all they can to ensure their ideal project is completed within the given time frame. Of course, each project comes with new difficulties to overcome, but the proof is in the pudding, and for Brian and Mika, the sweetness of watching families walk into their brand new home is the perfect reward for all their hard work. Reality series.

Reality series.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: Based in Kansas City, Tamara Day is a restoration expert who believes no home is too big for her to take on. Scouring the city for large, neglected mansions that she can buy on the cheap, she then uses her eye for design to transform these shabby houses into elegant homes. With her dad helping her on each project, they gut the decaying aspects of each house whilst keeping any characteristic and authentic features, enticing deep-pocketed buyers with open concepts and modern layouts. Using her experience from maintaining buildings on the family farm, she turns these decrepit structures into warm homes that are perfect for a family to move in and start creating memories.

programme.title: Living Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn purchase a house in Manoa with a mould-infested room and major roof damage, and they must take on a second flip to cover the cost.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Bargain Block follows home renovation experts and partners Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas on their journey to restore Detroits iconic American neighborhoods one house at a time. With sound advice and support from their friend—lifetime Detroit resident and real estate expert Shea Hicks-Whitfield, who is expecting her first child—Keith and Evan buy multiple rundown and abandoned houses on a single block, take them down to the studs, and create affordable, stylish and fully furnished starter homes that are ideal for first-time homebuyers. Now settled in the Motor City, the couple, who have renovated and purchased their own home and opened a new retail store and workshop, infuse every property with a functional layout, artful design and beautiful repurposed furniture. The end result is incredible transformations of dilapidated homes that are an inspiration to the entire neighborhood.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Real estate consultants and twin sisters Leslie Davis and Lyndsay Lamb have a knack for helping desperate homeowners sell their lifeless homes. After visiting nearby comparables, the sisters make the necessary, impactful renovations that convert these unlovable houses into diamonds in the rough.

programme.title: Fix My Frankenhouse
programme.desc: Boston-based home renovation experts and husband-wife team Mike and Denese Butler fix what they refer to as "Frankenstein" houses. These are older homes that have become filled with wonky layouts, misplaced staircases and maze-like hallways as different owners make changes over the years. Mike employs his construction know-how to create a functional flow, while Denese will capture the clients style with custom finishes. By blending elements of the older homes charm with modern design, the couple will produce stunning and cohesive spaces. Throughtout the episodes, Mike and Denese will overcome choppy rooms and wasted square footage for clients and work with their dads -- master carpenters John Butler and Peter Doyle -- to deliver one-of-a-kind projects for each family.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: After raising their family in Northern California, a couples ready to relocate to Southern California for waterfront living opportunities.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: Real estate professionals are searching for a new home in Lake Elsinore, California. They want an active lifestyle and waterfront views.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A father-daughter duo who save lives as a fireman and a nurse search for a coastal home in St. Augustine, Florida.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: After losing their home to a hurricane, a couple looks to rebuild their lives in the calmer location of Hernando Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Design Down Under
programme.desc: Husband and wife design build team, Richie Morris and Georgia Ezra, create one-of-a-kind, modern designs and bespoke spaces for their clients in Melbourne, Australia while juggling their thriving businesses and family of four.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs embrace small-town America by renovating classic homes in Bentonville, Arkansas. The resourceful couple preserves and transforms the areas historic houses into charming, updated masterpieces for young, potential buyers looking for a slower-paced lifestyle.

programme.title: Bahamas Life
programme.desc: The idyllic Bahamas are the perfect getaway for travellers and vacationers alike, but for some, once you visit the paradisaical islands, its hard to forget their beauty. These enamored individuals drop their city lives for these stunning Caribbean shores, leaving their livelihoods, stresses and struggles behind. In each episode of Bahamas Life, we detail the processes involved, the choice of islands and the remarkable real estate opportunities for prospective buyers looking to fulfill their dreams.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home.
